measurementLimits: Rows are seeded current-build gameplay runs, not human playtest proof.
Cosmetic randomness is intentionally outside the gameplay seed and should not be read as gameplay variance.
The personas are generic Platinum skill profiles; each game must define game-owned scenarios and release meaning.
A 30-run distribution is much stronger than one run, but still small enough that release decisions should also inspect failure clips and event logs.

genericPersonaContract.gameResponsibility: Each game maps the generic persona to scenarios, expected outcomes, release blockers, and any game-specific behavior allowances.

findings.title: Persona stage progression is out of order
findings.detail: Professional averaged stage 6.33, below Expert at 6.87.
